page_metadata.biotools__summary: IMGT/DomainSuperimpose is the IMGT® tool to superimpose 3D structures of two domains from IMGT/3Dstructure-DB. Domain 3D structures are numbered according to the IMGT-ONTOLOGY concept of IMGT unique numbering.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: IMGT/DomainSuperimpose is the IMGT® tool to superimpose 3D structures of two domains from IMGT/3Dstructure-DB. Domain 3D structures are numbered according to the IMGT-ONTOLOGY concept of IMGT unique numbering.
